# CLAUDE.md

Instructions for Claude Code. All rules from AGENTS.md apply.

## Testing

Run the full test suite before proposing changes. Do not submit with failing tests.

## Behavior

- Keep changes minimal and focused
- Verify your changes work before submitting
- When uncertain, ask rather than assume
- Add `Assisted-by: Claude` trailer to commit messages

## Scope

- Do not create new files without explicit instruction
- Do not modify build, CI, or release configuration
- If a task needs design decisions, stop and describe the options instead of choosing
